case_title: JUAN HERNANDEZ VS. MARTIN RODRIGO VARGAS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, MARTIN RODRIGO AN INDIVIDUAL DVA MV PLUMBING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS, MARTIN RODRIGO AN INDIVIDUAL DVA MV PLUMBING $6,041.16 PRINCIPAL, $139.74 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,405.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
